ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough in which the school is located */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code for the school */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City in which the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the school's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the school's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the school day */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the school day */,
  "student_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "percent_white" REAL /* Percentage of white students */,
  "percent_black" REAL /* Percentage of black students */,
  "percent_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students */,
  "average_score_sat_math" REAL /* Average SAT Math score for the school */,
  "average_score_sat_reading" REAL /* Average SAT Reading score for the school */,
  "average_score_sat_writing" REAL /* Average SAT Writing score for the school */,
  "percent_tested" REAL /* Percentage of students who took the SAT */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (public, private, charter, etc.) */,
  "school_level" TEXT /* Level of school (elementary, middle, high, etc.) */,
  "website" TEXT /* School website URL */,
  "email" TEXT /* School email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "average_score_sat_math" REAL /* Average SAT Math score for the school */,
  "average_score_sat_reading" REAL /* Average SAT Reading score for the school */,
  "average_score_sat_writing" REAL /* Average SAT Writing score for the school */,
  "percent_tested" REAL /* Percentage of students who took the SAT */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate for the school */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for the school */,
  "academic_performance_index" REAL /* Academic Performance Index (API) score for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "student_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "percent_white" REAL /* Percentage of white students */,
  "percent_black" REAL /* Percentage of black students */,
  "percent_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students */,
  "percent_native_american" REAL /* Percentage of Native American students */,
  "percent_other" REAL /* Percentage of students from other ethnic groups */,
  "male_to_female_ratio" REAL /* Male-to-female student ratio */,
  "free_lunch_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving free lunch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the school's location */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City in which the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the school's location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood in which the school is located */,
  "district" TEXT /* School district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_location_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational hours record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the school day */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the school day */,
  "monday_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation on Mondays */,
  "tuesday_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation on Tuesdays */,
  "wednesday_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation on Wednesdays */,
  "thursday_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation on Thursdays */,
  "friday_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation on Fridays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_hours_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_contact" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_contact_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school profile */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "history" TEXT /* Historical information about the school */,
  "programs" TEXT /* List of programs offered by the school */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the school */,
  "vision_statement" TEXT /* Vision statement of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_profiles_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code for the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "assistant_principal" TEXT /* Name of the assistant principal */,
  "school_counselor" TEXT /* Name of the school counselor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_operations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "student_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "grade_levels" TEXT /* Grade levels offered by the school */,
  "grade_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school */,
  "total_budget" INTEGER /* Total budget for the school */,
  "instructional_expenditures" INTEGER /* Instructional expenditures for the school */,
  "non_instructional_expenditures" INTEGER /* Non-instructional expenditures for the school */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_funding_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
